summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of the Piggy Bank (Huchas) app. All core features are working perfectly including user authentication, piggy bank management, transactions, and statistics. Fixed critical backend authentication bug during testing.
passed_tests: User registration and login (both regular user and admin)
Create piggy banks with name, color selection (mint, lavender, peach, coral, yellow), and goals
View all piggy banks in dashboard with real-time balance in EUR
Add money (deposit) to piggy banks with amount and description
Withdraw money from piggy banks with validation
View transaction history for each piggy bank
View statistics page with total savings, piggy bank count, and transaction count
Neo-brutalist design implementation with pastel colors and thick borders

success_percentage.frontend: 100% - All UI components and integrations working perfectly
